title: Wild Garlic and Leaf Korma
description: A flavorful and nutritious Indian-inspired korma dish made with wild garlic, leaves, and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: Wild garlic
ingredients.notes: Use fresh wild garlic leaves for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Indian leaves (spinach or collard greens)
ingredients.notes: Adjust the amount based on your preference

ingredients.name: Korma paste
ingredients.notes: You can make your own korma paste or use store-bought

ingredients.name: Coconut oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral-tasting oil for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Add more or less ginger based on your preference

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Use fresh garlic for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use Himalayan pink salt or sea salt for a better flavor

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chopped wild garlic and sauté for 2-3 minutes, until wilted.
Add the chopped Indian leaves and sauté for 2-3 minutes, until wilted.
Add the korma paste and stir well to combine.
Add the minced garlic and stir well to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
